metadata.description: Deterministic governance for Claude agents: an independent verifier that refuses a tool call before it runs.

plugins.name: recusal-gate
plugins.description: PreToolUse gate with no model in the decision path: refuses destructive tool calls before they run, even under bypassPermissions. Self-contained: the plugin vendors the exact recusal runtime it executes (no pip install), and the gate fails closed on a missing, substituted, or version-mismatched runtime, so the installed plugin identity names the implementation that decides. The POSIX launcher fails closed on macOS, Linux, and Windows with Git Bash; on Windows without Git Bash use `recusal init`, which registers a PowerShell-native fail-closed launcher.
